title: CORE requirement document header (ADR-105 D5)
description: Validates the YAML frontmatter header of a requirements document under .specs/requirements/. Authored per ADR-105 D5 as the minimum-viable schema for the 'requirement' document kind (URS documents, user-requirement specifications). The prose body is unconstrained; this schema governs only the structured header block. Unlike adr_status/paper_status, no per-class subset enum for requirement status exists yet (ADR-105 D8 deferral); this schema uses the full document_status superset. Status and title are required to enable automated drift detection; the id field mirrors the ADR id convention but is optional pending a formal requirement-id naming decision.

supersedes.description: Id of requirement document this supersedes, or null.
